SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IGNANT, CHANELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, BARBARA $6,301.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,376.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2016 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT IGNANT, CHANELLE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LEE, BARBARA $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,375.00, MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT GRANTED. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, February 17, 2016, in Department 525:
Chanelle Ignant, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Barbara Lee, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witnesses Amelia Holst and Justin Kitchen.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Ms. Ignant testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - 3/27/2015 letter from Barbara Lee to Chanelle Ignant

Appellant/Defendant, Barbara Lee testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - itemized charges and pictures

10:15 am: recess for the parties to discuss a settlement.
10:40am: all parties present. No settle agreement between parties.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Reset From Oct-30-15 To Dec-04-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Reset From Sep-21-15 To Oct-30-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
